title: Trump记者会：要达成协议，必须让我满意，我们要自由通行霍尔木兹
snippet: CBS记者Weijia Jiang问：要伊朗明天达成协议，需要做什么？Trump：必须达成让我满意的协议，部分内容是我们要霍尔木兹海峡自由通行

title: BREAKING: 美伊均拒绝停火协议条款
snippet: 美伊均拒绝拟议停火，特朗普坚持威胁摧毁伊朗发电厂，除非伊朗允许霍尔木兹海峡自由通行——Argus Media

title: 突发：特朗普拒绝了他自己向伊朗提出的停火协议
snippet: BREAKING NEWS: Donald Trump rejects ceasefire he proposed to Iran

title: 伊朗拒绝45天停火提议，要求战争永久结束
snippet: Iran rejects a 45-day ceasefire proposal, saying it wants a permanent end to the war rather than a temporary pause

title: 特朗普威胁：若无协议，明天午夜摧毁伊朗所有桥梁、发电厂停业
snippet: Trump: We have a plan where every bridge in Iran will be decimated by 12 o'clock tomorrow night, every power plant will be out of business

title: Trump pushes for peace deal as Israel, Iran trade missiles — Fox News
snippet: Trump pushes for peace deal as Israel, Iran trade missiles foxnews.com/live-news/trum #FoxNews Thank you Mr. President

title: 俄罗斯要求美国撤回最后通牒并提供调解；伊朗拒绝美方停火条款；美国伊斯法罕行动失败

title: 伊朗为何拒绝巴基斯坦停火提案？霍尔木兹海峡是重要筹码
snippet: Iran views the war and the Strait of Hormuz as a crucial bargaining chip that it can use to extract concessions from Washington

title: 特朗普称要没收伊朗石油：唾手可得，他们无能为力
snippet: President Trump says he wants to seize Iran's oil. It's there for the taking. There's not a thing they could do about it

title: 恐惧信号：散户看跌/看涨比率升至1.0，20年来最高
snippet: Fear among retail investors is rising: The ROBO Put/Call Ratio is up to 1.0, the highest in at least 20 years

title: 黄金日均交易量2025年达3610亿美元，是2021年的近3倍
snippet: Gold now trades more than most major financial assets in the world: Average trading volume in gold averaged ~$361 billion per day in 2025
